problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Ketamine-like. Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
